# Plato's Rave

> An incremental idle game with dungeon-crawler aesthetics, set inside a Container Store.

## What is this?

Plato's Rave is a free, open-source browser game inspired by the legendary 54-minute uninterrupted bit from My Brother, My Brother and Me Episode 674. You progress through 10 rooms of escalating absurdity — from a normal Container Store, through a warehouse rave, a Buffalo Wild Wings wing break, a pressure chamber descent, a gothic circus trap room, and ultimately to the throne of the Candy King.

## How it works

- Tap/click to dance and generate Vibe (the game's currency)
- Each room has a unique theme, NPCs, items, and ambient flavor text
- Buy items to boost your Vibe rate — each room has its own inventory
- Internal stats (Pressure and Pulse) determine which room is optimal
- Navigate between rooms to find the best earning strategy
- Room 10 is the Candy King's throne — defeat him to prestige
- Prestige earns Kandi, a permanent exponential multiplier (2^n)

## Rooms

1. The Container Store — a normal retail store (the entry point)
2. The Cloister of Confidence — the warehouse behind the store
3. Dry Rub Wings — Buffalo Wild Wings snack checkpoint (dry rub only)
4. The Best Rave of Your Life — peak intensity, neon lasers, UV glow
5. Barometric Pressure — submarine/pressure chamber descent
6. Sauce on Six — ghost kitchen wing checkpoint (now with sauce)
7. Traps — gothic circus, trap music, trapezes, gargoyle riddles
8. The Final Deception — a fake Container Store (something is wrong)
9. Nirvana — transcendent pleasure garden, the real best rave
10. The Candy King — dark room, single spotlight, candy crown, the boss

## Credits

- Game by Drew Brereton (https://entropist.ca)
- Inspired by Justin, Travis, and Griffin McElroy's MBMBaM
- Not affiliated with or endorsed by the McElroy family or Maximum Fun
- MIT License
- Source code: https://github.com/aebrer/platos-rave

## Technical

- Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, no build step
- All textures procedurally generated with Python (scripts in repo)
- Hosted on GitHub Pages at platosrave.club
- Saves to localStorage, works offline
